type_error_policy: NumPy ndarray and Python buffer-protocol coercions map to explicit typed FixedArray[Byte] backing storage and checked ImageData access. Shape, dtype, and foreign Python object errors are rejected before the Cairo API boundary rather than at runtime in cairoon.

test_image_surface_create_for_data_numpy.adaptation: A typed FixedArray[Byte] replaces NumPy's exported Python buffer. The MoonBit fixtures reproduce the ARGB32 population formula, shared backing storage, dimensions, stride, byte layout, and Cairo-owned lifetime without importing NumPy.
